GOOGL.rationale: DCF-10y (FCF $90B, 12% g y1-5, 8% y6-10, WACC 9%, term 3%) → $380. EV/EBITDA peer (EBITDA ~$130B, 18-22x) → $360. SOTP (Search $220+Cloud $95+YT $35+Waymo/Other $25, DOJ -15%) → $360. Three-method average $367. At $369.775 stock is essentially at fvMid. 4/22 fvMid was $376; revised to $367 reflecting sector risk-off de-rate on 6/5 and DOJ overhang persistence.
catalysts: DOJ remedy ruling Q4 — clarity event
risks: Search share erosion vs Meta Llama ad-stack

AVGO.rationale: DCF-10y (FCF $25B, custom-silicon CAGR 18% y1-4, 10% y5-10, WACC 9.5%, term 3%) → $430. EV/Sales peer (rev ~$65B FY26 est, 6-7x AI-semis) → $390-$455, mid $422. Peer comp (MRVL 15x sales outlier excluded; AVGO 6-7x diversified model) → $420. Three-method average $424. 6/5 selloff (-3.98%) brought stock below fvMid from prior 4/22 entry at fvMid. Modest upside restored.
risks: Export ban on advanced AI chips extending to AVGO products

CLS.rationale: EV/EBITDA peer (trailing EBITDA ~$800M, 12-18x hyperscaler ODM) → $350-$490, mid $420. PEG-normalized (fwd EPS ~$12 est, 40% growth, PEG 0.6-0.8x quality premium → P/E 28-35x) → $336-$420, mid $378. Two-method average $399. Stock dropped -6.27% on 6/5 sector risk-off; now at fvMid. Post-earnings event risk cleared. Prior 4/22 fvLow $300 revised up to $330 as earnings beats confirmed execution.
risks: ODM margin compression on component cost

MRVL.rationale: DCF-10y (FCF ~$4B, AI-custom+data-center 25% g y1-4, 15% y5-7, 8% y8-10, WACC 10%, term 3%) → $300. EV/Sales peer (rev ~$8B FY26 est, 10-11x conservative AI-semis, avoiding NVDA outlier) → $290-$320, mid $305. PEG-normalized (fwd EPS ~$4.50 est, 35% growth, PEG 0.7x → P/E ~32-35x) → $315. Three-method average $307. Stock +120.7% from avg cost $130.85; 6/5 drop -7.26% (prevClose $316.43→$288.83) consistent with sector risk-off pattern.
risks: Export restrictions on AI chips curbing datacenter rev
Technical: closed below prior support on high volume 6/5

MU.rationale: DCF-10y (FCF $10B FY26 HBM ramp, 20% g y1-3 cycle peak, 5% y4-10 mean reversion, WACC 10%, term 2.5%) → $960. EV/EBITDA peer (EBITDA ~$18B FY26, 8-12x memory cyclical discount → $820-$870 bear/base; 12-14x cycle-peak bull → $960-$1120) → conservative mid $845. PEG-normalized (fwd EPS ~$20+ HBM cycle, P/E 35-45x normalized not peak) → $700-$900. Three-method average $868. At $927.93 stock is 6.9% above fvMid — stretched. HBM qualification confirmed (news-feed verified). Strong but above FV band mid.
catalysts: AI datacenter HBM demand expansion beyond training to inference
risks: HBM supply normalization as SK Hynix/Samsung ramp
Export restrictions on HBM to China

SOXL.rationale: NAV-decay-adjusted: Underlying SOX index fair value estimated ~$5,700-$6,000; SOXL theoretical NAV at SOX FV midpoint adjusted for daily-reset decay (~5-8%/30d at VIX ~16) → $230-$280, decay-penalized mid $240. 3x-beta-scaling: 6/5 SOXL -17.24% vs SOX sector -4 to -9% — consistent with 3x leverage confirmation. Entry cost $132.21 → +64.5% unrealized at $217.41. No traditional DCF applicable to leveraged ETF — decay and beta are the primary pricing mechanics. fvLow $170 reflects SOX bear scenario + 60-day decay drag. fvHigh $310 reflects SOX bull + momentum.
catalysts: SOX sector recovery on risk-on rotation
risks: Leveraged ETF daily-reset decay in sideways/volatile market

TSM.rationale: DCF-10y (FCF $40B FY26, leading-edge monopoly, 15% g y1-4 AI demand, 8% y5-10, WACC 9%, term 3%) → $450. EV/Sales foundry-monopoly premium (rev ~$120B FY26 est, 4-5x → $480-$600B EV) → $490-$615, mid $520. EV/EBITDA peer (EBITDA ~$70B est, 12-16x foundry premium) → $420-$560, mid $490. Three-method average $487. Portfolio cleared (TSM exit 10sh @ $401.10 per 5/5 sync). Peer-reference entry maintained for sector context.
catalysts: CoWoS capacity expansion for AI HPC
risks: Export controls on advanced nodes to China
